targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Hypertables" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables;
SELECT count(*) AS "Chunks" FROM timescaledb_information.chunks;
SELECT sum(s.total_bytes) AS "Total Size" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s;
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_compressed) AS "Compressed Chunks" FROM timescaledb_information.chunks;
SELECT extversion AS "TimescaleDB" FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='timescaledb';
SELECT split_part(current_setting('server_version'), ' ', 1) AS "PostgreSQL";
SELECT sum(s.table_bytes) AS "Table Size" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s;
SELECT sum(s.index_bytes) AS "Index Size" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s;
SELECT sum(s.toast_bytes) AS "TOAST Size" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s;

WITH cs AS (SELECT (chunks_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass)).* FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h) SELECT (sum(total_bytes) / NULLIF(count(*), 0))::bigint AS "Avg Chunk Size" FROM cs;

SELECT h.hypertable_name AS "Name", s.table_bytes AS "table", s.index_bytes AS "index", s.toast_bytes AS "toast", s.total_bytes AS "total", (SELECT count(*) FROM timescaledb_information.chunks c WHERE c.hypertable_name = h.hypertable_name) AS "chunks", (SELECT count(*) FROM timescaledb_information.chunks c WHERE c.hypertable_name = h.hypertable_name AND c.is_compressed) AS "compressed" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s ORDER BY s.total_bytes DESC;

SELECT h.hypertable_name, count(c.*)::int AS chunks FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h LEFT JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.hypertable_name = h.hypertable_name GROUP BY h.hypertable_name ORDER BY chunks DESC;

SELECT c.range_start AS time, h.hypertable_name AS metric, cs.total_bytes AS value FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h JOIN LATERAL chunks_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) cs ON true JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.chunk_schema = cs.chunk_schema AND c.chunk_name = cs.chunk_name WHERE c.range_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT c.range_start AS time, h.hypertable_name AS metric, cs.total_bytes AS value FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h JOIN LATERAL chunks_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) cs ON true JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.chunk_schema = cs.chunk_schema AND c.chunk_name = cs.chunk_name WHERE c.range_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1, 2;
SELECT count(*) AS "Total Jobs" FROM timescaledb_information.jobs;
SELECT count(*) AS "Failing Jobs" FROM timescaledb_information.job_stats WHERE last_run_status='Failed' OR (last_successful_finish IS NOT NULL AND last_run_started_at > last_successful_finish);
SELECT sum(total_successes) AS "Total Successes" FROM timescaledb_information.job_stats;
SELECT sum(total_failures) AS "Total Failures" FROM timescaledb_information.job_stats;

SELECT j.job_id, j.application_name AS application, j.proc_schema || '.' || j.proc_name AS procedure, j.schedule_interval::text AS interval, COALESCE(s.last_run_started_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamptz) AS last_run, COALESCE(s.last_run_status, '[Never run]') AS status, COALESCE(s.last_run_duration::text, '-') AS duration, COALESCE(s.next_start, '1970-01-01'::timestamptz) AS next_run, COALESCE(s.total_runs, 0) AS runs, COALESCE(s.total_successes, 0) AS successes, COALESCE(s.total_failures, 0) AS failures FROM timescaledb_information.jobs j LEFT JOIN timescaledb_information.job_stats s ON s.job_id = j.job_id ORDER BY failures DESC, last_run DESC;
SELECT count(*) AS "CAggs" FROM timescaledb_information.continuous_aggregates;
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE compression_enabled) AS "Compressed CAggs" FROM timescaledb_information.continuous_aggregates;

WITH s AS (SELECT sum(s.before_compression_total_bytes) AS before_b, sum(s.after_compression_total_bytes) AS after_b FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_compression_stats(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s) SELECT CASE WHEN before_b > 0 THEN round(((before_b - after_b)::numeric / before_b) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Compression Ratio" FROM s;

SELECT GREATEST(COALESCE(sum(s.before_compression_total_bytes - s.after_compression_total_bytes), 0), 0) AS "Saved" FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h, LATERAL hypertable_compression_stats(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s;

SELECT ca.view_name AS "View", COALESCE((SELECT max(s.last_successful_finish) FROM timescaledb_information.job_stats s JOIN timescaledb_information.jobs j ON j.job_id = s.job_id WHERE j.proc_name = 'policy_refresh_continuous_aggregate' AND j.hypertable_name = ca.view_name), '1970-01-01'::timestamptz) AS "Last Refresh", COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - (SELECT max(s.last_successful_finish) FROM timescaledb_information.job_stats s JOIN timescaledb_information.jobs j ON j.job_id = s.job_id WHERE j.proc_name = 'policy_refresh_continuous_aggregate' AND j.hypertable_name = ca.view_name)))::int, 0) AS "Lag (s)" FROM timescaledb_information.continuous_aggregates ca ORDER BY ca.view_name;

SELECT h.hypertable_name AS hypertable, COALESCE(s.total_chunks, 0) AS chunks, COALESCE(s.number_compressed_chunks, 0) AS compressed_chunks, COALESCE(s.before_compression_total_bytes, 0) AS before, COALESCE(s.after_compression_total_bytes, 0) AS after, GREATEST(COALESCE(s.before_compression_total_bytes - s.after_compression_total_bytes, 0), 0) AS saved, CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.before_compression_total_bytes, 0) > 0 THEN round(((s.before_compression_total_bytes - s.after_compression_total_bytes)::numeric / s.before_compression_total_bytes) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS ratio FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h LEFT JOIN LATERAL hypertable_compression_stats(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass) s ON true ORDER BY before DESC;

SELECT h.hypertable_name AS hypertable, COALESCE(s.inserts, 0)::bigint AS inserts, COALESCE(s.updates, 0)::bigint AS updates, COALESCE(s.deletes, 0)::bigint AS deletes FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h LEFT JOIN (SELECT c.hypertable_name, sum(t.n_tup_ins) AS inserts, sum(t.n_tup_upd) AS updates, sum(t.n_tup_del) AS deletes FROM pg_stat_user_tables t JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.chunk_schema = t.schemaname AND c.chunk_name = t.relname GROUP BY c.hypertable_name) s ON s.hypertable_name = h.hypertable_name ORDER BY inserts DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Row Modifications per Hypertable
panels.description: Cumulative inserts/updates/deletes since last pg_stat_user_tables reset, summed across all chunks of each hypertable.

targets.rawSql: WITH per_chunk AS (SELECT c.hypertable_name, sum(t.n_live_tup) AS live, sum(t.n_dead_tup) AS dead, max(GREATEST(t.last_vacuum, t.last_autovacuum)) AS last_vacuum, max(GREATEST(t.last_analyze, t.last_autoanalyze)) AS last_analyze FROM pg_stat_user_tables t JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.chunk_schema = t.schemaname AND c.chunk_name = t.relname GROUP BY c.hypertable_name) SELECT hypertable_name AS hypertable, live, dead, CASE WHEN (live + dead) > 0 THEN round((dead::numeric / (live + dead)) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS dead_pct, last_vacuum, last_analyze FROM per_chunk ORDER BY dead_pct DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH cs AS (SELECT h.hypertable_name AS ht, (chunks_detailed_size(format('%I.%I', h.hypertable_schema, h.hypertable_name)::regclass)).* FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables h) SELECT cs.ht AS hypertable, cs.chunk_name AS chunk, c.range_start, c.range_end, cs.total_bytes AS size, c.is_compressed::text AS compressed FROM cs JOIN timescaledb_information.chunks c ON c.chunk_schema = cs.chunk_schema AND c.chunk_name = cs.chunk_name ORDER BY cs.total_bytes DESC LIMIT 25;

panels.title: Insert Rate per Hypertable
panels.description: Stacked rate of inserts per hypertable, summed across chunks. Source: pg_hypertable_n_tup_ins (custom collector in pg_exporter, see modules/timescaledb/files/pg_exporter/0701-pg_hypertable.yml).

panels.title: Update Rate per Hypertable
panels.description: Stacked rate of updates per hypertable, summed across chunks.

panels.title: Delete Rate per Hypertable
panels.description: Stacked rate of deletes per hypertable, summed across chunks.
